channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats win in Virginia but it won't be the final say in a national redistricting competition
item.description: Democrats are celebrating an election win in Virginia that could put them slightly ahead in the national redistricting competition that President Dona...

item.title: Houston changes ordinance limiting cooperation with ICE after pressure from governor
item.description: A Houston city ordinance that limited police officers’ cooperation with federal immigration agents has been amended after Texas’ governor had threaten...

item.title: Federal appeals court blocks California law requiring federal agents to wear identification
item.description: An appeals court has blocked a California law passed in 2025 requiring federal immigration agents to wear a badge or some form of identification

item.title: The Gates Foundation is reviewing its Epstein ties as released emails raise questions for funders
item.description: The Gates Foundation confirmed Wednesday that it is reviewing its ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein

item.title: 6 people are charged in a plot to steal and resell dozens of cars from the DC area
item.description: Six people have been charged with plotting to steal at least 20 cars from the Washington, D.C., area and sell them to buyers in the United States and ...
